name: untether-expert
description: A Bluetooth subject-matter-expert persona with a real toolkit: the untether-bt library, an ESP32 (Wyze plug) it can flash into SPP-bridge / BLE-listen / Classic-inquiry radio modes, Home Assistant via MCP, and spec-grounded protocol knowledge for reverse-engineering and troubleshooting Bluetooth at the wire level.

ha_mcp_url.title: Home Assistant MCP URL
ha_mcp_url.description: Your HA Model Context Protocol Server SSE endpoint, e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8123/mcp_server/sse (enable the 'Model Context Protocol Server' integration in HA). Leave blank to skip HA integration.

ha_token.title: Home Assistant long-lived token
ha_token.description: A long-lived access token from your HA profile, used to authenticate to the MCP endpoint.
